reach_why: Mostly extends existing skepticism about fluency and evaluation; adds little genuinely new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Connects grounding failure, delegation gaps, reframing generation, and meaningless true premises into one evaluative critique.
falsifiable_why: Parts are testable via reframing-generation and delegation criteria, but core caution remains partly interpretive.
explanation: Fluency and pattern completion do not justify self-oversight without grounded evidence and generated reframing ability.
